TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mama Intiw == O sarakatay no yincumin a mitooray ci mama intiw. O nga'ayay 'orip a o nipitoor ci mama Intiw, itini i 1918 miheca 12 folad 1 romi'ad pakayni ci Lien Teli (Rev.A.B.Nielson) a pipatirengan a malasicoci, itiya i 1921 miheca 1 folad 30 romi'ad itira ci Lin Yanchen foksian makapa patireng to ciwlo no Tokar (Cyamisan) kiwkay. Nanoya i 1919 miheca macakat macowat ko mitooray tamdaw no kiwkay, o mikihatiyaay i 'ayaway no lahok to lihay ira ko 175 ko tamdaw, herek no lahok a lihaty ira ko 155 ko tamdaw. To dadaya mikihatiyaay to sa'opo minanam to kiwiko ira ko 70 no tamdaw, o 'Amis ira ko 40 no tamdaw, o ci mama Intiw ko mifalicay to sowal. Nikawrira mafalic a mafiyol to ko to'ek no taliyok itiya, o mikadafoay i Tangafolan cingra, sa cingangan sa ono kowaping to ka nipipanganganan. No Dipong a to'ekan itiya, o nano Posko no Kalingko a kowan ko Tokar saka ono Payrang ko pipangangan saka'eca kalaemong. No 'Amis a pitoki to pangangan, o nano hilakana a tilid ko ngangan, itiya mipatireng to pipalalan to minato no kalingko, Suhua-lalan, Huatong cilamalay ato Huatong lalan itiya, saheto o i enaray a 'Amis Piyoma ko miemongay. Matira saka, milimek ci mama Intiw, matalaw kafana'an no ngangan, o kamatini ningra saka caay kanga'ay no tayal a mipatenak. Talacowa matiratira aca, o kacingangan ningra a matilid i kiwkay ko kacingangan i, ka itira pisintingan to ratoh i no 'Amisan ato pinanaman no mitooray ira cingra a matayal to mifalicay misa no 'Amis to sowal. Orasaka matiniay ko parana'an no pipaso'elin a mitooray, awaay i tilid no likisi a paheci, orasaka kaitira ningra i no 'Amis patenakay a todong, caay ka patodong to nitayalan ningra a mikerid to paso'elinay a heci ato wacay i 'ayaw, dengan to o sa'ayaway mitooray paso'elin ato sa'ayaway ciwlo no masa'Amuisay ko pihayda. Nika o wawa ato teloc ningra a wawawa masasiisil itira i Tokar (Cyamisan) kiwkay (Payrang) ato Takoliaw kiwkay ('Amis) ko pikihatiya a milihay, midoedo to mitooray mirocok to nipaso'elinan a 'orip.
S.PHON: == mama intiw == o~u sarakataj no~u jinʦo~u~umin a mito~uo~uraj ʦi mama intiw. o~u ŋaʡajaj ʡo~urip a o~u nipito~uo~ur ʦi mama intiw, itini i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakajni ʦi ɾiən təɾi (rəb~v.a.b~b~v.niəɾso~un) a pipatirəŋan a maɾasiʦo~uʦi, itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira ʦi ɾin janʦħən fo~uksian makapa patirəŋ to~u ʦiwɾo~u no~u to~ukar (ʦjamisan) kiwkaj. nano~uja i **** miħəʦa maʦakat maʦo~uwat ko~u mito~uo~uraj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kiwkaj, o~u mikiħatijaaj i ʡajawaj no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ɾiħaj ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk a ɾiħatj ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mikiħatijaaj to~u saʡo~upo~u minanam to~u kiwiko~u ira ko~u ** no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʡamis ira ko~u ** no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦi mama intiw ko~u mifaɾiʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ. nikawrira mafaɾiʦ a mafijo~uɾ to~u ko~u to~uʡək no~u taɾijo~uk itija, o~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~uaj i taŋafo~uɾan ʦiŋra, sa ʦiŋaŋan sa o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ to~u ka nipipaŋaŋanan. no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡəkan itija, o~u nano~u po~usko~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u a ko~uwan ko~u to~ukar saka o~uno~u pajraŋ ko~u pipaŋaŋan sakaʡəʦa kaɾaəmo~uŋ. no~u ʡamis a pito~uki to~u paŋaŋan, o~u nano~u ħiɾakana a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan, itija mipatirəŋ to~u pipaɾaɾan to~u minato~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u, so~u~uħo~u~ua-ɾaɾan, ħo~u~uato~uŋ ʦiɾamaɾaj ato~u ħo~u~uato~uŋ ɾaɾan itija, saħəto~u o~u i ənaraj a ʡamis pijo~uma ko~u miəmo~uŋaj. matira saka, miɾimək ʦi mama intiw, mataɾaw kafanaʡan no~u ŋaŋan, o~u kamatini niŋra saka ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u tajaɾ a mipatənak. taɾaʦo~uwa matiratira aʦa, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan niŋra a matiɾiɬ~ɮ i kiwkaj ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan i, ka itira pisintiŋan to~u rato~uħ i no~u ʡamisan ato~u pinanaman no~u mito~uo~uraj ira ʦiŋra a matajaɾ to~u mifaɾiʦaj misa no~u ʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ. o~urasaka matiniaj ko~u paranaʡan no~u pipaso~uʡəɾin a mito~uo~uraj, awaaj i tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾikisi a paħəʦi, o~urasaka kaitira niŋra i no~u ʡamis patənakaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, ʦaaj ka pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u nitajaɾan niŋra a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u paso~uʡəɾinaj a ħəʦi ato~u waʦaj i ʡajaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u o~u saʡajawaj mito~uo~uraj paso~uʡəɾin ato~u saʡajawaj ʦiwɾo~u no~u masaʡamo~u~uisaj ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa. nika o~u wawa ato~u təɾo~uʦ niŋra a wawawa masasiisiɾ itira i to~ukar (ʦjamisan) kiwkaj (pajraŋ) ato~u tako~uɾiaw kiwkaj (ʡamis) ko~u pikiħatija a miɾiħaj, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u mito~uo~uraj miro~uʦo~uk to~u nipaso~uʡəɾinan a ʡo~urip.
S.FORM: == Mama Intiw == O sarakatay no yincumin a mitooray ci mama intiw. O nga'ayay 'orip a o nipitoor ci mama Intiw, itini i 1918 miheca 12 folad 1 romi'ad pakayni ci Lien Teli (Rev.A.B.Nielson) a pipatirengan a malasicoci, itiya i 1921 miheca 1 folad 30 romi'ad itira ci Lin Yanchen foksian makapa patireng to ciwlo no Tokar (Cyamisan) kiwkay. Nanoya i 1919 miheca macakat macowat ko mitooray tamdaw no kiwkay, o mikihatiyaay i 'ayaway no lahok to lihay ira ko 175 ko tamdaw, herek no lahok a lihaty ira ko 155 ko tamdaw. To dadaya mikihatiyaay to sa'opo minanam to kiwiko ira ko 70 no tamdaw, o 'Amis ira ko 40 no tamdaw, o ci mama Intiw ko mifalicay to sowal. Nikawrira mafalic a mafiyol to ko to'ek no taliyok itiya, o mikadafoay i Tangafolan cingra, sa cingangan sa ono kowaping to ka nipipanganganan. No Dipong a to'ekan itiya, o nano Posko no Kalingko a kowan ko Tokar saka ono Payrang ko pipangangan saka'eca kalaemong. No 'Amis a pitoki to pangangan, o nano hilakana a tilid ko ngangan, itiya mipatireng to pipalalan to minato no kalingko, Suhua-lalan, Huatong cilamalay ato Huatong lalan itiya, saheto o i enaray a 'Amis Piyoma ko miemongay. Matira saka, milimek ci mama Intiw, matalaw kafana'an no ngangan, o kamatini ningra saka caay kanga'ay no tayal a mipatenak. Talacowa matiratira aca, o kacingangan ningra a matilid i kiwkay ko kacingangan i, ka itira pisintingan to ratoh i no 'Amisan ato pinanaman no mitooray ira cingra a matayal to mifalicay misa no 'Amis to sowal. Orasaka matiniay ko parana'an no pipaso'elin a mitooray, awaay i tilid no likisi a paheci, orasaka kaitira ningra i no 'Amis patenakay a todong, caay ka patodong to nitayalan ningra a mikerid to paso'elinay a heci ato wacay i 'ayaw, dengan to o sa'ayaway mitooray paso'elin ato sa'ayaway ciwlo no masa'Amuisay ko pihayda. Nika o wawa ato teloc ningra a wawawa masasiisil itira i Tokar (Cyamisan) kiwkay (Payrang) ato Takoliaw kiwkay ('Amis) ko pikihatiya a milihay, midoedo to mitooray mirocok to nipaso'elinan a 'orip.
S.PHON: == mama intiw == o~u sarakataj no~u jinʦo~u~umin a mito~uo~uraj ʦi mama intiw. o~u ŋaʡajaj ʡo~urip a o~u nipito~uo~ur ʦi mama intiw, itini i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakajni ʦi ɾiən təɾi (rəb~v.a.b~b~v.niəɾso~un) a pipatirəŋan a maɾasiʦo~uʦi, itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira ʦi ɾin janʦħən fo~uksian makapa patirəŋ to~u ʦiwɾo~u no~u to~ukar (ʦjamisan) kiwkaj. nano~uja i **** miħəʦa maʦakat maʦo~uwat ko~u mito~uo~uraj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kiwkaj, o~u mikiħatijaaj i ʡajawaj no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ɾiħaj ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk a ɾiħatj ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mikiħatijaaj to~u saʡo~upo~u minanam to~u kiwiko~u ira ko~u ** no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʡamis ira ko~u ** no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦi mama intiw ko~u mifaɾiʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ. nikawrira mafaɾiʦ a mafijo~uɾ to~u ko~u to~uʡək no~u taɾijo~uk itija, o~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~uaj i taŋafo~uɾan ʦiŋra, sa ʦiŋaŋan sa o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ to~u ka nipipaŋaŋanan. no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡəkan itija, o~u nano~u po~usko~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u a ko~uwan ko~u to~ukar saka o~uno~u pajraŋ ko~u pipaŋaŋan sakaʡəʦa kaɾaəmo~uŋ. no~u ʡamis a pito~uki to~u paŋaŋan, o~u nano~u ħiɾakana a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan, itija mipatirəŋ to~u pipaɾaɾan to~u minato~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u, so~u~uħo~u~ua-ɾaɾan, ħo~u~uato~uŋ ʦiɾamaɾaj ato~u ħo~u~uato~uŋ ɾaɾan itija, saħəto~u o~u i ənaraj a ʡamis pijo~uma ko~u miəmo~uŋaj. matira saka, miɾimək ʦi mama intiw, mataɾaw kafanaʡan no~u ŋaŋan, o~u kamatini niŋra saka ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u tajaɾ a mipatənak. taɾaʦo~uwa matiratira aʦa, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan niŋra a matiɾiɬ~ɮ i kiwkaj ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan i, ka itira pisintiŋan to~u rato~uħ i no~u ʡamisan ato~u pinanaman no~u mito~uo~uraj ira ʦiŋra a matajaɾ to~u mifaɾiʦaj misa no~u ʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ. o~urasaka matiniaj ko~u paranaʡan no~u pipaso~uʡəɾin a mito~uo~uraj, awaaj i tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɾikisi a paħəʦi, o~urasaka kaitira niŋra i no~u ʡamis patənakaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, ʦaaj ka pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u nitajaɾan niŋra a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u paso~uʡəɾinaj a ħəʦi ato~u waʦaj i ʡajaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u o~u saʡajawaj mito~uo~uraj paso~uʡəɾin ato~u saʡajawaj ʦiwɾo~u no~u masaʡamo~u~uisaj ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa. nika o~u wawa ato~u təɾo~uʦ niŋra a wawawa masasiisiɾ itira i to~ukar (ʦjamisan) kiwkaj (pajraŋ) ato~u tako~uɾiaw kiwkaj (ʡamis) ko~u pikiħatija a miɾiħaj, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u mito~uo~uraj miro~uʦo~uk to~u nipaso~uʡəɾinan a ʡo~urip.
